description: Coupling matrix for soft activation between fault types. Values > 1.0 indicate positive coupling (co-activation), < 1.0 indicate suppression.

notes.amp_ref_coupling: amp_error and ref_error have strong coupling (1.5) because amplitude shifts can be caused by reference issues
notes.freq_isolation: freq_error is relatively isolated from amp/ref
notes.normal_suppression: normal strongly suppresses fault type activation
